top_signals.title: Middle East energy crisis pushes India, Southeast Asia back toward coal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Building Fan Community Key to WNBA Success, Says Valkyries President Jess Smith
top_signals.summary: Jess Smith, president of the Golden State Valkyries, said that building community and connection in a deeper way and then building a business around that foundation has been key to her teams success in their first season. Smith said that the Valkyries, a team that was recently rated at a $1 billion valuation, are serious about upholding 'golden state culture' and investing in the fan experience to attract a dedicated fanbase and grow the franchise as the WNBA enters its 30th season.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
